message:
feat: ingest Codex sessions, fix CLI shebang and SQLite init

- Add #!/usr/bin/env bun shebang to src/index.ts so the global CLI
  binary works without a Bun wrapper script
- Expand ~/... db_path before opening SQLite and mkdirSync the parent
  directory, eliminating SQLITE_CANTOPEN on first run
- Parse Codex session format (session_meta + response_item records)
  alongside existing Claude format; skip AGENTS.md / environment_context
  boilerplate; extract user/assistant text from input_text/output_text blocks
- Add ~/.codex/sessions to default sources and migrate legacy single-source
  configs transparently
- Refactor scanSources to recursive DFS so Codex date-nested paths like
  YYYY/MM/DD/*.jsonl are discovered
- Add claude auth status preflight in summarize to give actionable errors
  when Claude Code is not authenticated
- Update settings UI copy to mention Codex alongside Claude

Tests: add expandPath coverage, is_subagent detection, Codex parse/ingest

Fixes #2, #3

files.patch:
@@ -83,15 +83,15 @@ Config lives at `~/.config/engineering-notebook/config.json`:
 }
 ```
 
-| Field | Description | Default |
-|-------|-------------|---------|
-| `sources` | Directories to scan for session files | `["~/.claude/projects"]` |
-| `exclude` | Glob patterns for directories to skip | `["-private-tmp*", "*-skill-test-*"]` |
-| `db_path` | SQLite database location | `~/.config/engineering-notebook/notebook.db` |
-| `port` | Web server port | `3000` |
-| `day_start_hour` | Hour (0-23) when a "day" starts (for grouping late-night sessions with the previous day) | `5` |
-| `remote_sources` | SSH remote sources to sync before ingesting | `[]` |
-| `auto_sync_interval` | Seconds between auto-syncs when serving | `60` |
+| Field                | Description                                                                              | Default                                      |
+| -------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
+| `sources`            | Directories to scan for session files                                                    | `["~/.claude/projects"]`                     |
+| `exclude`            | Glob patterns for directories to skip                                                    | `["-private-tmp*", "*-skill-test-*"]`        |
+| `db_path`            | SQLite database location                                                                 | `~/.config/engineering-notebook/notebook.db` |
+| `port`               | Web server port                                                                          | `3000`                                       |
+| `day_start_hour`     | Hour (0-23) when a "day" starts (for grouping late-night sessions with the previous day) | `5`                                          |
+| `remote_sources`     | SSH remote sources to sync before ingesting                                              | `[]`                                         |
+| `auto_sync_interval` | Seconds between auto-syncs when serving                                                  | `60`                                         |
